sql.query: SELECT utr.tenantId FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr WHERE utr.userId=:userId AND utr.tenantId=:tenantId AND utr.isActive=1 LIMIT 1

options.message: Your tenant session has expired. Please sign in again.

sql.query: INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_terminology (tenantId,termKey,singularLabel,pluralLabel) SELECT :tenantId,'workflow',:singularLabel,:pluralLabel WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_tenant_terminology WHERE tenantId=:tenantId2 AND termKey='workflow')
UPDATE tbl_tenant_terminology SET singularLabel=:singularLabel,pluralLabel=:pluralLabel,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND termKey='workflow'
